evals.prompt: I just updated the api-endpoint skill in .claude/skills/api-endpoint/SKILL.md. Check if the Codex side is in sync and fix any drift.
evals.expected_output: Compares .claude/skills/api-endpoint/SKILL.md with .agents/skills/api-endpoint/SKILL.md, reports differences, fixes drift
expectations: Strips frontmatter before comparing body content
Ignores Claude-specific frontmatter fields (disable-model-invocation, user-invocable, allowed-tools)
Reports whether the files are in sync or out of sync with specific details
If drift exists, updates the out-of-date side; if already in sync, reports no changes needed

evals.prompt: Run a full sync check across all config files
evals.expected_output: Comprehensive comparison of all file pairs in the dual-config system
expectations: Checks service docs (CLAUDE.md vs AGENTS.md for each service)
Reports a summary of in-sync and out-of-sync pairs
Uses /cmd vs $cmd translation when comparing root CLAUDE.md and AGENTS.md
